Description: Manage state with useState useReducer useContext and external libraries like Zustand or Redux Toolkit
Do: Use useState for local; useReducer for complex; Context for shared; Zustand/RTK for global
Dont: Use class components; prop drill through 10+ layers; use multiple state management libraries

Description: Set up typed navigation with React Navigation including deep linking and auth flows
Do: Define typed navigation params; use navigation guards; handle deep links; use nested navigators
Dont: Pass untyped params; use string-based navigation; forget to handle auth state changes
Code Bad: navigation.navigate('Product', { id: 123 });\n// No TypeScript types, no auth guard

Description: Use React.memo useMemo and useCallback to prevent unnecessary re-renders
Do: Wrap expensive components in memo; memoize computed values; use useCallback for stable refs
Dont: Over-memoize everything; useMemo for simple values; use inline functions in render

Description: Create styles with StyleSheet.create and centralize design tokens for consistency
Do: Use StyleSheet.create; define spacing/color/typography tokens; use themed styles
Dont: Use inline styles; hardcode values; pass style objects without StyleSheet
Code Bad: <View style={{ padding: 16, backgroundColor: 'white', borderRadius: 8 }}>\n  // Inline style - no optimization, no consistency\n</View>

Guideline: Use Turbo Modules for Native Bridge
Description: Use the New Architecture Turbo Modules for type-safe efficient native bridge communication
Do: Use codegen with Turbo Modules; define specs in TypeScript; handle errors on native side
Dont: Use legacy NativeModules; bridge large data synchronously; forget error handling

Description: Replace FlatList with FlashList for significantly better list scrolling performance
Do: Use FlashList with estimatedItemSize; use keyExtractor; avoid anonymous renderItem
Dont: Use ScrollView with map for lists; use FlatList without keys; nest VirtualizedLists
Code Bad:
<ScrollView>
  {products.map(p => <ProductCard key={p.id} product={p} />)}
</ScrollView>
// All items rendered at once - terrible for 1000+ items

Description: Catch rendering errors with Error Boundaries to prevent full app crashes
Do: Wrap screens with ErrorBoundary; show fallback UI; report errors to crash analytics
Dont: Let errors crash the entire app; use try-catch in render methods
Code Bad: // No error boundary\n// One component error crashes entire app\n// User sees blank white screen

Guideline: Use Jest and React Native Testing Library
Description: Test components with RNTL focusing on user behavior not implementation details
Do: Test what user sees and does; use getByRole/getByText; mock native modules
Dont: Test implementation details; snapshot test everything; skip interaction tests

Description: Enable strict TypeScript for type safety across the entire codebase
Do: Enable strict mode; type all props and state; use discriminated unions for state
Dont: Use any; disable strict checks; use JavaScript files in RN project

Description: Use react-native-reanimated for 60fps animations running on UI thread
Do: Use useAnimatedStyle; run on UI thread with worklets; use shared values
Dont: Use Animated API for complex animations; animate on JS thread; use setState for animations
Code Bad: // JS thread animation - janky\nAnimated.timing(scale, { toValue: 0.95, useNativeDriver: false }).start();\n// useNativeDriver: false = runs on JS thread = jank
